name: Misawa Homes Chugoku Co., Ltd.
summary: Misawa Homes Chugoku Co., Ltd. designs, constructs, and sells wooden prefabricated houses, ceramic houses, apartments, condominiums, buildings, and stores in Japan. It is also involved in the real estate-related business; and sale, design, and construction of housing-related products, such as interior and exterior. The company was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Okayama, Japan. Misawa Homes Chugoku Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Misawa Homes Co., Ltd.
